name: Pehonix Table Lamp - 25 Inch Height - TBL4249 - White/Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the PEHONIX table lamp, a stunning piece that combines artistry and function. Standing at 25.5 inches, this lamp features a white and gold palette that effortlessly complements any decor. The ceramic body provides an elegant foundation, while the iron base and neck add a touch of modern sophistication. Whether placed on a bedside table or used as an accent in your living room, this lamp creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. Its design not only enhances the aesthetic appeal of your home but also provides practical lighting. The combination of ceramic and iron materials ensures a solid structure that will serve your lighting needs beautifully. Embrace the blend of style and illumination with the PEHONIX table lamp and transform any room into a haven of comfort and elegance.
